A '''short sword''' was a simple and ancient type of [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]],<ref name="Campaign" /> largely overlooked by contemporary warriors, but still effective in the [[Limb/Legends|hands]] of a skilled wielder.<ref name="KOTOR" /> The [[Sword/Legends|sword]] could be used to parry incoming melee attacks, and was often used while [[Jar'Kai/Legends|wielding another]] [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]],<ref name="Campaign" /> as the former did not unbalance the user when held in the off-hand.<ref name="KOTOR" />

In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], the weapon was used by both factions, although [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]] and [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibroswords]] were more common. Short swords were wielded by some [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] who [[Attack on the Endar Spire|attacked]] and boarded the Republic [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' [[Orbit/Legends|above]] the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. On the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] itself, short swords were used by some members of the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

Short swords were used as melee weapons by [[Krath war droid/Legends|Krath war droids]].<ref name="Campaign" />
